name: Joe's iPhone
subject: 4 months and 22 days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
We have a limited amount of time before Hoosiers head to the polls -- 4 months and 22 days, to be precise -- and I intend to take advantage of every single minute. |
---

| | Peter,

This election is really starting to kick into high gear. We have a limited amount of time before Hoosiers head to the polls -- 4 months and 22 days, to be precise -- and I intend to take advantage of every single minute. We're not the only ones, though, and you can bet that Rep. Braun and the GOP want to do the same.

We've got an army of grassroots Hoosiers behind us, and I know we can do this. But it's going to be expensive, and we need supporters like you to come through for us now -- because with the tsunami of super PAC money flooding into Indiana against us, "later" might be too late.

The good news? ALL contributions through tomorrow will be matched, so your donation goes twice as far. Will you pitch in $5 to help us defeat Rep. Braun and his dark money allies? Here's a special link you can use: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protect-in](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2e62/7377f838/3c7dc718/51f93453/1211952622/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protect-in?refcode=20180614.2nd&amount=5")**

Thanks,
Joe |
---|---|---

|
---

Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
---

P.O. Box 891, Indianapolis, IN 46206
[Unsubscribe](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2e62/7377f838/3c7dc718/51f93452/1211952622/VEsE/ "http://action.joeforindiana.com/unsubscribe")

name: Jacky
subject: checking in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
Sending fundraising messages like this has to be one of my least favorite parts of the campaign, team - so I'll be quick, but this is so important. The stakes couldn't be higher right now, and falling short today would be disastrous for our chances to win in Nevada and take back the Senate.
After Emily reached out this morning, we thought enough supporters would step up to help make up our shortfall, but only 587 of you did, and now we're on track to miss yet another goal.
We could seriously lose this race if we don't turn things around now - and Dems _will_ lose the race for Senate control if we lose here in Nevada. **We cannot let that happen.**
**Please, now more than ever, I'm counting on you to give a few dollars today to help us turn things around so we can take back the Senate this fall. Here's the best link:**[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd784/4fbb2af3/702d4266/5e8a5a4a/3022935320/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azc1NS1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=jtk755-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")****
Thank you - truly.
Jacky

**Rosen for Nevada
PO BOX 27195
LAS VEGAS, NV 89126**

| Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
---
Jacky Rosen is a Democrat running for U.S. Senate in Nevada - our best chance to flip a red seat blue and take back the Senate. We're working hard each day to elect her so she can fight for affordable health care, a cleaner environment, better education and more. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network. Please add us to your address book to make sure you keep receiving updates.

Emails are an important way for us to stay in touch with our supporters. 95% of our contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200 - and without that support, Democrats will lose our best opportunity to take back the Senate this November.

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd784/4fbb2af3/702d4266/5e8a5a4b/3022935320/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=email_footer&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500"). Together, we can take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to receive fewer emails, please [click here](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd784/4fbb2af3/702d4266/5e8a5a48/3022935320/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/s/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). If you'd like to stop receiving all emails, please [click here](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd784/4fbb2af3/702d4266/5e8a5a49/3022935320/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support.

Contributions to Rosen for Nevada are not tax-deductible.

name: Brad Elkins
subject: hear us out on this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---

| | | I want to make sure you saw Martin's note about what's happening with the latest attacks on the Affordable Care Act and pre-existing conditions.

You can read his note below, and **_[I hope you'll support our campaign so we can keep working on solutions to improve health care for all.](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-junemm?amount=5&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+I+hope+yoursquoll+support+our+campaign+s&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30CL_180614_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_30CL_180614_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30CL_180614_2_2")_**

\---
Brad Elkins
Campaign Manager
Martin Heinrich for Senate

_On Thursday, June 14, 2018, Martin Heinrich wrote:_

> **_[Below is a long email about how I'm fighting for our health care. If you want to skip reading it and donate $5 so I can keep fighting for health care for all, click here >>](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-junemm?amount=5&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+Below+is+a+long+email+about+how+Irsquom+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30CL_180614_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_30CL_180614_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30CL_180614_2_2")_**
>
>
> * * *
>
> This is important,
>
> Last year, Democrats united to defeat "Trumpcare," the Republican effort to repeal the Affordable Care Act (ACA) and eliminate key protections and health programs for Americans.
>
> I'm still proud we were able to stop congressional Republicans' direct attack on the ACA, but now the Trump administration is going after health care.
>
> **_[If I'm going to keep fighting to protect the health care of those who need it most, I'm going to need your help. Please consider donating $5 today >>](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-junemm?amount=5&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=3+-+If+Irsquom+going+to+keep+fighting+to+pro&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30CL_180614_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_30CL_180614_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30CL_180614_2_2")_**
>
> One of the most important pieces of the ACA is the guarantee that insurance companies cannot deny you coverage based on pre-existing conditions. For over 300,000 New Mexicans, this provision ensures they can receive health insurance and get the care they need in order to live healthy, productive lives.
>
> **A group of Republican state attorneys general are now suing over the Affordable Care Act, and the Trump administration is saying they will not defend the law in court.** If Republicans win this lawsuit, it will make it unconstitutional to ban insurance companies from denying coverage to those with pre-existing conditions.
>
> That means a return to the days when insurance companies could refuse to cover people that have had cancer, diabetes, and even been pregnant.
>
> If we want to stop rising health care costs, we need to have leaders in the Senate who are willing to seek bipartisan improvements to the ACA. **My opponent, however, was "grieved" that Trumpcare didn't pass last year, and he's promised he'll support more proposals like it that would upend our health care system.**
>
> I'm running for reelection so I can continue my work for New Mexicans, including improving insurance markets so people can get the care they need. In a few weeks I'll face my first Federal Election Commission (FEC) deadline since our primary, and we must report our biggest numbers yet to fight off my challenger.
>

Please, can you contribute today so I can return to the Senate and work on protecting health care for New Mexicans and Americans everywhere?](http://nm.martinheinrich. name: Tom Perez
subject: Will you help re-elect Jon Tester to the Senate?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www
body:
In order to take back the Senate in November, Democrats must come together to protect Jon's seat -- the math just doesn't work if we lose Montana.
---
This is an important time to stand with Democrats and defend a critical Senate seat, Derek.

Jon Tester has been fighting for the great state of Montana in the Senate for over a decade, but Donald Trump won the state by 20 points in 2016. If we are going to take back the Senate in November, Democrats must come together to protect Jon's seat -- the math just doesn't work if we lose Montana. That's why I'm asking:

**Will you donate $10 to Jon Tester's campaign and Democrats nationwide today?**

**[ DONATE: $10](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522c93/4067b0a/64223bfe6/7fba1dc4/3302561077/VEsEAA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/reelect-jon-tester?amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=25+-+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20180615_tp_s1&source=em_20180615_tp_s1&refcode=em_20180615_tp_s1")
[DONATE: $25](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522c93/4067b0a/64223bfe6/7fba1dc5/3302561077/VEsEAw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/reelect-jon-tester?amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=26+-+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20180615_tp_s1&source=em_20180615_tp_s1&refcode=em_20180615_tp_s1")
[DONATE: $50](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522c93/4067b0a/64223bfe6/7fba1dc2/3302561077/VEsEAg/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/reelect-jon-tester?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=27+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20180615_tp_s1&source=em_20180615_tp_s1&refcode=em_20180615_tp_s1")
[DONATE: $100](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522c93/4067b0a/64223bfe6/7fba1dc3/3302561077/VEsEDQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/reelect-jon-tester?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=28+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20180615_tp_s1&source=em_20180615_tp_s1&refcode=em_20180615_tp_s1")
[DONATE: $200](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522c93/4067b0a/64223bfe6/7fba1dc0/3302561077/VEsEDA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/reelect-jon-tester?amount=200&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=29+-+DONATE+200&utm_campaign=em_20180615_tp_s1&source=em_20180615_tp_s1&refcode=em_20180615_tp_s1")
[Or donate another amount.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522c93/4067b0a/64223bfe6/7fba1dc1/3302561077/VEsFBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/reelect-jon-tester?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=30+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20180615_tp_s1&source=em_20180615_tp_s1&refcode=em_20180615_tp_s1")
** There are 10 Democratic senators up for re-election in states that went red in 2016. Regardless of the momentum we've seen this election cycle, you know that protecting these seats and flipping others from red to blue is going to take an incredible amount of organizing from Democrats across the country.

With so much on the line this November, will you make your first donation of 2018 so that Democrats like Jon have the resources they need to win? This is a critical opportunity to directly support his campaign.

**[Donate $10 to Jon Tester's campaign and Democrats across the country. Together we'll re-elect Jon to the Senate and elect Democrats up and down the ballot.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522c93/4067b0a/64223bfe6/7fba1dce/3302561077/VEsFBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/reelect-jon-tester?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=31+-+Donate++if+consinConsGroup28497++set+max&utm_campaign=em_20180615_tp_s1&source=em_20180615_tp_s1&refcode=em_20180615_tp_s1")**

Thanks for standing with Jon and Democrats nationwide.

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

P.S. In order to take back the Senate in November, Democrats need to defend Jon Tester's seat in Montana. **[Donate $10 right now to Jon Tester's campaign and Democrats nationwide.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522c93/4067b0a/64223bfe6/7fba1dcf/3302561077/VEsFBw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/reelect-jon-tester?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=32+-+Donate++if+consinConsGroup28497++set+max&utm_campaign=em_20180615_tp_s1&source=em_20180615_tp_s1&refcode=em_20180615_tp_s1")**

If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, [**submit this form to unsubscribe**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522c93/4067b0a/64223bfe6/7fba1dcc/3302561077/VEsFBg/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=33+-+submit+this+form+to+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=em_20180615_tp_s1&source=em_20180615_tp_s1&refcode=em_20180615_tp_s1").

If you'd only like to receive our most important messages, [**sign up to receive less email**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522c93/4067b0a/64223bfe6/7fba1dcd/3302561077/VEsFAQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/less-email-signup?source=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=34+-+sign+up+to+receive+less+email&utm_campaign=em_20180615_tp_s1&refcode=em_20180615_tp_s1").

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't your preferred email address, [**update your contact information**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522c93/4067b0a/64223bfe6/7fba1dca/3302561077/VEsFAA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/update-info-dnc?source=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=35+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20180615_tp_s1&refcode=em_20180615_tp_s1"). If you're ready to elect Democrats in all 50 states, [**make a contribution today**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522c93/4067b0a/64223bfe6/7fba1dcb/3302561077/VEsFAw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dnc-email-footer?refcode=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=36+-+make+a+contribution+today&utm_campaign=em_20180615_tp_s1&source=em_20180615_tp_s1"). This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Just reply to this email to send any comments, criticisms, or feedback. Our community management team reads every message from supporters like you. Thanks for supporting our party!

Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www.Democrats.org](www.Democrats.org), and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: The White House
subject: 5 ways President Trump has restored American leadership
body:
Your 1600 Daily:
| | [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=6742bf6af3e5dfd58e3fabfe60ec913032599c24d3044fadf9f37f24be2217abf56507acd016a9e76931cc4c1c114441aa9cd3b3a335b98e) The White House • June 15, 2018
## 5 ways President Trump has restored American leadership
**President Donald J. Trump promised that putting America first** would be the solemn duty of his Administration. That approach also makes for an effective foundation for U.S. leadership in the world. Here are five accomplishments from the past year: | • | **Destroying ISIS** : The Trump Administration worked with allies to liberate territory occupied by the self-declared caliphate. In December, the Iraqi government announced all Iraqi territory had been freed from ISIS control.
---|---
• | **Responding to Syria's use of chemical weapons** : In April, the United States, the United Kingdom, and France launched strikes against targets associated with Syria's chemical weapons capabilities, responding forcefully to the Assad regime's savage attacks. | • | **Recognizing Jerusalem as Israel's capital** : President Trump followed through on his promise--and that of prior U.S. presidents--to recognize Jerusalem as Israel's capital. The U.S. Embassy in Jerusalem, called for by Congress since 1994, officially opened last month. | • | **Withdrawing from the unacceptable Iran deal** : The deal provided the Iranian regime with a windfall of cash to destabilize the Middle East. President Trump ended U.S. participation in the deal and directed his Administration to begin re-imposing sanctions. | • | **Momentum for real change in North Korea** : With the historic Singapore summit, President Trump took a bold first step to completely, verifiably, and irreversibly denuclearize the Korean Peninsula. Before the talks, Kim Jong Un had already released three detained Americans and appears to have closed his nuclear test site.
[How President Trump has restored American leadership on the world stage](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=6742bf6af3e5dfd5e1f95ad2c424880d659df8166051e4892f8ac7589e71f47fc558a27876d6aebef55b88c582cf9699afde483797feecdc)
**Watch** : [President Trump answers questions after the Singapore summit ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=6742bf6af3e5dfd5c43ff01b9ec0192fa0f6e8c377740eb2188d5bbf6df4ba5fbac504b77044223c9b9ce2006160efab541a4d6a1697f53c)
---
|

## The Day Ahead
Vice President Mike Pence will travel to Rochester, Michigan, before delivering remarks at a "Tax Cuts to Put America First" event in Columbus, Ohio. [Watch live at 4:25 p.m. ET.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=6742bf6af3e5dfd564038404e375fc3c06f2d170030c57f0f7facd2c4df63625b6c2fe23d66d630472c214d459e298bd6307bbf0dadc3ee5)

---
|

## The largest gathering of Hispanic clergy in the United States
**The 12th Annual National Hispanic Prayer Breakfast and Conference** took place this week in Washington, D.C. Vice President Mike Pence addressed the group yesterday, discussing how faith is the great unifier in a diverse country.
**"[Remember] those words that Americans have clung to** throughout our Nation's history, words first inscribed millennia ago," the Vice President said. "That in these challenging times of seemingly too much division, that we still have hope and we still have confidence, because we believe Him who said, 'I know the plans I have for you . . . plans to prosper you, and not to harm you, plans to give you a hope and a future.'"
[Read Vice President Pence's full message to the Hispanic clergy. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=6742bf6af3e5dfd50a81218e3e95d748d5838b8eca10a756b44728fd7dcef3b1422c7a0dea31d78018d997b615ad4fc5941b13db26738602)
---
|

## Photo of the Day
Official White House Photo by Katie Ricks
**President Donald J. Trump answers questions on the north drive of the White House** | June 15, 2018

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=6742bf6af3e5dfd54c7c0f3c528fe6e4cbcedbcd5b8fdc91341dda3725f4012515064936a8f8b539527be0ef63a30bdabeec7157ac9fc792) | [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=6742bf6af3e5dfd5a1bd2160357c6559bd40bfaa9b11bba830f543b990a7892aff1f823f66c6e6f8371d7c80ee0aa160f29b1102549018ec) | [Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4482de207f7795833117ddcedd87db2e7f35018e0e00acf44b8a9949fe5c5630f7aaba3cef268df5c807ded4cee97eb1fafe03c909ba1b063)
---

name: Bob =?UTF-8?Q?Fertik=2C=20Democrats=2Ecom?=
subject: Ripping children from the arms of their parents is just plain wrong
body:
Dear Activist,

A few days ago I introduced new legislation to prohibit the Trump Administration from indiscriminately separating immigrant kids from their parents.

I believe Congress has a moral obligation to stand up and stop the federal government from ripping children from the arms of their parents. We should be in the business of keeping families together, not tearing them apart.

Many of these families are fleeing violence and instability in search of security and safety here in the United States. It’s wrong to traumatize these kids further. Congress must take action right now.

Add your name if you agree:

Sign my petition demanding the Trump Administration stop separating immigrant children from their parents and demand Congress pass our new legislation to solve this moral crisis. (https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/petition-180615-dems-com-immigration/?source=ads_dems_180615_all_ad1)

Sign the petition (https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/petition-180615-dems-com-immigration/?source=ads_dems_180615_all_ad1)

My heart breaks for these kids being separated from their families at the border -- many are just frightened toddlers. Congress has to make ending this immoral policy a priority -- right now.

Thanks for adding your voice to this fight.

-- Kamala

name: Team Davis
subject: Peter, will you step up?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paul Davis for Kansas
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/plkogQqA4C1VzsZuEntVLujWMUW5kdyZBC--OV2lK4I=/S8pyZltjKgqKZt5Xm3PYZEypJ2Rba6uzrP0Q75NDgn8=?gpsid=11_36_1283&refcode=em18_180615_midmo2_fnd_gq_cust__TD&utm_campaign=em18_180615_midmo2_fnd_gq_cust__TD&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda)
Dear Peter,

Did you see the latest email from our finance director, Shelbie?

She talks about all of the obstacles we're up against in this race, and she's right -- sending Paul Davis, a leader with our Kansas values, to D.C. won't be an easy task. And some of the people who fight the hardest against that change will be the ones with nearly unlimited funds.

**[Will you step up and help us send a strong message that we're ready for a change in our leadership? Chip in whatever you can right now.](https://act.myngp.com/el/plkogQqA4C1VzsZuEntVLujWMUW5kdyZBC--OV2lK4I=/S8pyZltjKgqKZt5Xm3PYZEypJ2Rba6uzrP0Q75NDgn8=?gpsid=11_36_1283&refcode=em18_180615_midmo2_fnd_gq_cust__TD&utm_campaign=em18_180615_midmo2_fnd_gq_cust__TD&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda)**

Thank you,

Team Davis

\----------------------------

From: Shelbie Konkel, Davis for Kansas
Subject: I'm tired, are you?
Date: June 13, 2018 at 10:11 AM CDT

Dear friend,

I don't know about you, but I'm tired of the way things are. Our leaders are more concerned with fighting each other than standing up for their constituents. Nothing gets done -- and there's no denying that it's time for things to change.

That's why I joined this team to help elect Paul Davis. But massive special interest donors and billionaires have already pledged to spend millions to keep things exactly the way they are now.

**[Peter, it's going to take all of us to make a difference and change the way our leaders act -- and that starts with sending Paul Davis to D.C. in November. Chip in to help make it happen!](https://act.myngp.com/el/plkogQqA4C1VzsZuEntVLujWMUW5kdyZBC--OV2lK4I=/S8pyZltjKgqKZt5Xm3PYZEypJ2Rba6uzrP0Q75NDgn8=?gpsid=11_36_1283&refcode=em18_180615_midmo2_fnd_gq_cust__TD&utm_campaign=em18_180615_midmo2_fnd_gq_cust__TD&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda)**

We're up against some huge obstacles. Paul Ryan's super PAC already purchased over a million dollars of ads right here in the 2nd District -- and it's only a matter of time before more money comes flooding in to pay for misleading attack ads.

As Paul's finance director, I know that going toe-to-toe with big spenders like Ryan or the Koch Brothers won't be easy. But I'm also confident that you're up to the challenge.

**[Let's show them what we're made of -- chip in whatever you can right now.](https://act.myngp.com/el/plkogQqA4C1VzsZuEntVLujWMUW5kdyZBC--OV2lK4I=/S8pyZltjKgqKZt5Xm3PYZEypJ2Rba6uzrP0Q75NDgn8=?gpsid=11_36_1283&refcode=em18_180615_midmo2_fnd_gq_cust__TD&utm_campaign=em18_180615_midmo2_fnd_gq_cust__TD&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda)**

Thank you,

Shelbie Konkel
Finance Director

Contributions or gifts are not tax deductible. Contributions from foreign nationals and corporations are prohibited. Federal election law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

Paid for by Paul Davis for Kansas
---

Paul Davis for Congress
PO Box 944
Lawrence KS 66044 United States

name: Laura Zapata, Bredesen 2018
subject: Quick update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BREDESEN FOR SENATE
body:
#
Hey Peter --
In the last month, we’ve had a lot happen in this race, so I wanted to give you a quick recap so you were up-to-speed:
1. President Trump came to Tennessee last month to raise money for our opponent and to attack Governor Bredesen (who he called “Philbert”). Funny enough, our office welcomed a stray kitten whose name is Philbert and is ready to be adopted.
2. The polls continue to show our message of working together for common sense is resonating with voters, which is drawing the attention of hyper-partisan special interests, who are ready to send a “Death Star” to tear down Governor Bredesen.
3. [**We have a fundraising deadline coming up tomorrow that will be critical to having the resources we need to contact voters and open up field offices just like we did last week in Memphis, and we’d appreciate if you could chip in $15, or whatever you can.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1412313/7689084/912624268?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjg1MjIyMC1iMjcwLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM2ODEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NN4LWO89K_9xibZJH2Kj_LdCHiBNHvGtF5haSKaZikk=&refcode=em180615-MM4-full&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=15&recurring=true)

**Here’s the biggest takeaway — we have the momentum as the state is heating up.**
We are proving every day to political pundits and the Washington establishment that a campaign focused on Tennessee is how we will win. **But we can’t afford to take anything for granted.**
We know that as you read this email, Washington partisans and out-of-state mega donors are getting ready to drop millions into Tennessee in an effort to buy this race and protect the status quo in Congress.
[**We need your help to protect our momentum. Can you add a contribution of $15 to our campaign today and help us carry our momentum into the months ahead?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1412314/7689085/912624268?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjg1MjIyMC1iMjcwLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM2ODEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NN4LWO89K_9xibZJH2Kj_LdCHiBNHvGtF5haSKaZikk=&refcode=em180615-MM4-full&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=15&recurring=true)
**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1412315/7689086/912624268?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjg1MjIyMC1iMjcwLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM2ODEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NN4LWO89K_9xibZJH2Kj_LdCHiBNHvGtF5haSKaZikk=&refcode=em180615-MM4-full&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=15&recurring=true)**
We can win this thing, but only if we come together, stay focused on Tennessee and keep up our momentum.
Thanks for all you do!
Laura Zapata
Communications Director
Bredesen 2018

name: Take Action [via Rosen For Nevada]
subject: need input from you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
Hey there - As the head of the Environmental Protection Agency, Scott Pruitt is intent on undermining the agency he's supposed to run. He's made rolling back clean air and clean water rules part of his mission, threatening the health of Americans and our planet. _He even rejects the scientific consensus on climate change!_

And not only that - he's perhaps the most unethical Cabinet-level official in the Trump Administration, amassing one scandal after another. If we're going to protect our planet for future generations, we need public servants in these critical positions - not corrupt politicians who want to deny science and abuse their taxpayer-funded office for personal gain.

**He 's dangerous for our environment, and there's no time to waste. We want to hear what you think: should Scott Pruitt resign?**

name: staff@maggiehassan.com
subject: we'll NEVER forget this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc0b2/2a380d31/e6f61ed/f19255/3801527929/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Hello --
It was October 5, 2015 and we had no idea what to expect. Would people support then-Governor Maggie Hassan's campaign for U.S. Senate? And if they did, would it be enough? Could we unseat a darling of the far-right? Could we really win?
The first one came in at 9:55 AM. A $5 donation from John in Bow, New Hampshire. Three minutes later, $25 from Meredith in Manchester.
In the hours following Maggie's campaign announcement, we saw support from teachers, writers, farmers, and everyone in between. Still, we never imagined that 33 months later, 337,000 online donations would come in from people who believe in Maggie Hassan.
Today, that support is still incredibly important. With Donald Trump in the White House and a more extreme Senate than any of us could have predicted, we need to be prepared for anything.
**Our June donations are slipping a bit, and we need 9 more donations from 03264 by tonight to get back on track.[ Every single donation makes a difference, so could you please chip in $3 or more right now? clean_body: "" Hello -- It was October 5, 2015 and we had no idea what to expect. Would people support then-Governor Maggie Hassan's campaign for U.S. Senate? And if they did, would it be enough? Could we unseat a darling of the far-right? Could we really win? The first one came in at 9:55 AM. A $5 donation from John in Bow, New Hampshire. Three minutes later, $25 from Meredith in Manchester. In the hours following Maggie's campaign announcement, we saw support from teachers, writers, farmers, and everyone in between. Still, we never imagined that 33 months later, 337,000 online donations would come in from people who believe in Maggie Hassan. Today, that support is still incredibly important. With Donald Trump in the White House and a more extreme Senate than any of us could have predicted, we need to be prepared for anything. Our June donations are slipping a bit, and we need 9 more donations from 03264 by tonight to get back on track. "" If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. "" "" "" "" Maggie Hassan is serving in the United States Senate because thousands of people give what they can, when they can. We're so proud that grassroots supporters, not corporate special interests, power her campaign. And, we're thrilled that you're part of this community. Thanks for everything, Team Maggie Staff ""

**"Representative Devin Nunes, a man of tremendous courage and grit, may someday be recognized as a Great American Hero for what he has exposed and what he has had to endure."** _**\- President Donald J. Trump**_ Fellow Conservative, **I stand for transparency and truth.** In this day and age, adherence to the truth is the only thing protecting our Constitution. Sadly, there are all too many in Washington who disagree. The biased, far-left media and Democratic leadership attack me every step of the way, calling me "dangerous," "deliberately dishonest," and even accusing me of being a Russian spy! **These attacks prove to me that we must continue exposing the scandals and coverups of the Obama administration.** Despite their best attempts to oust me from the Chairmanship of the House Intelligence Committee, I'm still here and working harder than ever. National Democrats have descended upon California in an attempt to eliminate conservative warriors like you and me, friend. _**I won't let that happen.**_ They want to silence our voice and obliterate the work of Republican lawmakers. I'm standing up to them and fighting harder, speaking up for conservative patriots and protecting the legacy of Republican greats. **[Will you stand with me?](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MTY2LTgxZjYzMmVmNjEwMzQwMzJiNTIyMjk0Nzg2ZTZlNTFi%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9naXZlLnZpY3RvcnlwYXNzcG9ydC5jb20vbnVuZXMvZG9uYXRlLz91dG1fc291cmNlPUFFLUdPUDMmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAxODA2MTVfQUUtR09QM19EZXZpbk51bmVzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMTgwNjE1X0dvaW5nT25PZmZlbnNl&K=yh9IZ2yFV5UPg9vKGI2zYw)** I need friends like you on my team as the Left goes all-in to replace me this fall. They're targeting me because **I dare to stand up for what's right and true, for the America I believe in.** I'll say it - the Democrats have come unhinged in their absolute hatred of President Trump and Republican lawmakers. That's why I'm reliant on conservative leaders like you to join my team and protect our House majority this fall. We can't let people like Nancy Pelosi and Bernie Sanders take control of Congress. **[With you on my team, I know we'll win.](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MTY2LTgxZjYzMmVmNjEwMzQwMzJiNTIyMjk0Nzg2ZTZlNTFi%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9naXZlLnZpY3RvcnlwYXNzcG9ydC5jb20vbnVuZXMvZG9uYXRlLz91dG1fc291cmNlPUFFLUdPUDMmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAxODA2MTVfQUUtR09QM19EZXZpbk51bmVzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMTgwNjE1X0dvaW5nT25PZmZlbnNl&K=Y3Ip2hck4RCEcX6MjNOa5g)** We won't sit back and let the Far Left trample right through our home. Let's take the fight to the liberals. **[Donate any amount to my campaign right now!](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MTY2LTgxZjYzMmVmNjEwMzQwMzJiNTIyMjk0Nzg2ZTZlNTFi%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9naXZlLnZpY3RvcnlwYXNzcG9ydC5jb20vbnVuZXMvZG9uYXRlLz91dG1fc291cmNlPUFFLUdPUDMmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAxODA2MTVfQUUtR09QM19EZXZpbk51bmVzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMTgwNjE1X0dvaW5nT25PZmZlbnNl&K=nv2BaAYHUJSOnAmJVs775g)** Thank you, Congressman Devin Nunes [ **Contribute Now** ](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MTY2LTgxZjYzMmVmNjEwMzQwMzJiNTIyMjk0Nzg2ZTZlNTFi%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9naXZlLnZpY3RvcnlwYXNzcG9ydC5jb20vbnVuZXMvZG9uYXRlLz91dG1fc291cmNlPUFFLUdPUDMmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAxODA2MTVfQUUtR09QM19EZXZpbk51bmVzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMTgwNjE1X0dvaW5nT25PZmZlbnNl&K=GpPv37rOZD3f0gL8yMk_aQ) |

body:

name: Jeffrey Carson
subject: Another endorsement!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Austin Petersen for US Senate
body:
| Friend, We're excited to announce that another Missouri Representative, Mark Matthiesen has endorsed Austin Petersen in his run for U.S. Senate! Matthiesen is from Maryland Heights and is currently serving his first term representing Missouri’s 70th district. He joins Representative Jim Neely as the second member of the Missouri Legislature to endorse Petersen. Matthiesen entered his first term with introduction and support of legislation for tax cuts, medical marijuana legalization, and cleanup of the Bridgeton landfill. A devout Christian, he believes in the power of the family and is dedicated to conservative values such as lowering taxes and eliminating government overreach. Rep. Matthiesen’s endorsement signifies a broader trend of Missouri legislators courageously standing on principle and refusing to fall in line behind Mitch McConnell’s establishment pick. Austin and Rep. Matthiesen share many of the same conservative beliefs and values. His district should be proud to be represented by such a principled man, and Austin is honored to receive his endorsement for U.S. Senate. We're excited to continue sharing more endorsements as they flood in. Keep up the good work. We wouldn't be here without all of you behind us. Best, Jeffrey Carson, Campaign Manager
[http://www.austinpetersen.com/](http://www.austinpetersen.com/?e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=matthiesen_endorsement&n=1)

---

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).

name: Amy
subject: So much still to do
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hi there,

With less than 150 days until Election Day, the next phase in this campaign is underway -- and I need you with me. Because we still have so much to accomplish together.

Prescription drug prices are still too high for Minnesota families -- but I'm pushing legislation to lower them. Our elections are still in danger from foreign interference and dark money -- so I have bipartisan bills that would safeguard our elections and shine a light on who's behind online ads. The Administration isn't making climate change a priority -- but I'm working with the Senate Climate Action Taskforce to make sure we take it seriously.

There's no doubt we have a lot to do. But we can get it done together.

My team has set a mid-month goal of $40,000, with a deadline of Saturday, June 16th. **Will you donate to help us meet it, so I can keep working for you in the Senate?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Ben Jealous
subject: I voted yesterday! Have you?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
Don't wait in line on Election Day!

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a66a/7ab0e2c4/7f98c86b/349ba345/201077092/VEsH/ "https://elections.maryland.gov/voting/documents/2018_Early_Voting_Centers_web.pdf") Friend -- I'm a guy who lives by a routine and a schedule -- every morning, I do the same exact things: I get up. I fix a cup of coffee. I scroll through my phone a bit to check the news. Get dressed, suspenders and all, and I'm out the door. That's why when I voted yesterday, I knew I needed to make a plan to make sure it was a priority. And it helped that I missed the lines on Election Day, right? [**You can early vote right now in Maryland -- make a plan, then find your nearest polling place and get out there to vote!**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a66a/7ab0e2c4/7f98c86b/349ba345/201077092/VEsE/ "https://elections.maryland.gov/voting/documents/2018_Early_Voting_Centers_web.pdf") Polls are open every day from now through next Thursday, from 10am to 8pm. If you can get there after breakfast like me, that's great -- if you're an early afternoon voter, that works too! And if you vote after eating dinner, perfect. Anytime is a great time to vote -- but you just have to make it a priority. [**If you want to avoid the lines on Election Day, make a plan to early vote before next Thursday -- see you at the polls!**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a66a/7ab0e2c4/7f98c86b/349ba345/201077092/VEsF/ "https://elections.maryland.gov/voting/documents/2018_Early_Voting_Centers_web.pdf") Thanks, Ben | [CHIP IN »](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a66a/7ab0e2c4/7f98c86b/349ba344/201077092/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bj-st5-18?refcode=OHQ06158A")
---

* * *
PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, [click here](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a66a/7ab0e2c4/7f98c86b/349ba347/201077092/VEsD/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/update-your-information?source=emfooter"). Email is one of the most critical tools for our campaign, but you can let us know if you would like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a66a/7ab0e2c4/7f98c86b/349ba346/201077092/VEsA/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=emfooter") going forward. If you'd like to [unsubscribe](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a66a/7ab0e2c4/7f98c86b/349ba341/201077092/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"), you can do so here. [Make a contribution to Ben and Susie here](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a66a/7ab0e2c4/7f98c86b/349ba340/201077092/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bjst_contribute?refcode=emfooter"). Contributions or gifts to Friends of Ben Jealous are not tax deductible.

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Donald Trump barely lost Minnesota in 2016

body:
I'm counting on your help for Tina. | [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b230/c1f7015/68272f27/1142ae5f/4265273094/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email?refcode=rtw_180615_warren_em-full") Friends, Donald Trump barely lost Minnesota in 2016 -- so now Republican operatives across the country are telling their billionaire donors the same thing: If we dump truckloads of money into Minnesota, this could be our chance to win. And we wouldn't just be turning the state red -- we'd be defeating one of the most dynamic new members of the Democratic caucus. We can't let that happen. We need Tina Smith in the U.S. Senate to help students suffering from the crushing debt of student loans, to hold Wall Street accountable, and to make sure we are making affordable health care available to everyone who needs it. This will not be an easy fight. The other side has more money -- but we've shown time and time again that when grassroots donors like you pitch in, we can take on the special interests and win. **Pitch in $5 or whatever you can today towards Tina 's June end-of-quarter goal. Every dollar makes a huge difference towards keeping this seat in Democratic hands and winning this special election:** _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/tsm-email?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=rtw_180615_warren_em-full") [Or, donate another amount](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b230/c1f7015/68272f27/1142ae51/4265273094/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJ0c20tZW1haWwiLCJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoicnR3XzE4MDYxNV93YXJyZW5fZW0tZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/tsm-email?refcode=rtw_180615_warren_em-full") I know $5 doesn't seem like a lot when the other side is spending millions on attack ads, but here's the truth: Republicans play big-money politics because they're afraid of us. They're afraid of the energy each of us can bring to the fight. They're afraid of the way we march together in the streets to resist their attacks on our health care, their giveaways to Wall Street, and their corporate tax cuts. Most of all, they are afraid of leaders like Tina who come from the grassroots - and the people power behind her campaign, a campaign funded by donors giving $5, $10, and $25. And you know what? They should be. When thousands of people like you stand together behind leaders like Tina, that's the most powerful political force in the country. **[That's why I'm asking you to dig deep, give $5 -- or whatever you can -- to Tina's campaign and prove the power of the people once again. We can win this fight, but it's going to take all we have to do it.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b230/c1f7015/68272f27/1142ae5f/4265273094/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email?refcode=rtw_180615_warren_em-full")** Thank you for being a part of this, Elizabeth Warren **[Contribute](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b230/c1f7015/68272f27/1142ae5f/4265273094/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email?refcode=rtw_180615_warren_em-full")**

name: Emily Cain, EMILY's List
subject: As Ohio goes...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4740/24c69fd9/1a2dfc12e/188122bf/2187390964/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFER34N_digital_email_20180615_OHSpotlight_inact&source=WQEFER34N_digital_email_20180615_OHSpotlight_inact")
---

Peter,

It's known as a swing state, but in recent years, Ohio has become one of the most extreme anti-choice states in the country.

That's because Republicans control all but one statewide elected office and hold supermajorities in both state legislative chambers. They've used that power to introduce dangerous anti-choice legislation, including everything from mandatory funerals for fetal tissue to a **_total abortion ban._**

So we've endorsed 12 pro-choice Democratic women running for the Ohio state legislature to fight back against Republicans' unchecked power and protect Ohio women and families.

**[Donate $3 to help elect pro-choice Democratic women in Ohio and across the country and put a stop to Republicans' extreme anti-choice agenda.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4740/24c69fd9/1a2dfc12e/188122b8/2187390964/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180615_email_OHSpotlight?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+elect+prochoice+Democra&utm_campaign=WQEFER34N_digital_email_20180615_OHSpotlight_inact&source=WQEFER34N_digital_email_20180615_OHSpotlight_inact")**

In 2016, Republicans in the Ohio state legislature passed the most extreme abortion ban in the country, which would have banned abortion after six weeks -- before many women even know they're pregnant.

Maybe the worst of all: This year, 20 Ohio legislators said they approve of a total abortion ban without exception for the life of the woman. If passed, a woman seeking an abortion and doctors who provide them could be charged with aggravated homicide -- a crime that can be punished with the _death penalty_.

It's clear that anti-choice Ohio Republicans are willing to go to extremes. And the only way to stop them is to replace them with pro-choice Democratic women.

We've recruited some amazing candidates who are ready to get the job done.

**Donate $3 to help pro-choice Democratic women win in Ohio and block Republicans' anti-choice agenda:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Elect-Ohio-Women](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4740/24c69fd9/1a2dfc12e/188122b9/2187390964/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180615_email_OHSpotlight?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgElectOhioWomen&utm_campaign=WQEFER34N_digital_email_20180615_OHSpotlight_inact&source=WQEFER34N_digital_email_20180615_OHSpotlight_inact")**

Thanks -- and go team!

Emily Cain
Executive Director, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4740/24c69fd9/1a2dfc12e/188122ba/2187390964/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180615_email_OHSpotlight?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WQEFER34N_digital_email_20180615_OHSpotlight_inact&source=WQEFER34N_digital_email_20180615_OHSpotlight_inact")

|
# EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.
---

name: Phil Bredesen
subject: This isn’t all that unusual
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BREDESEN FOR SENATE
body:
#
Peter --
Yesterday, I visited a group of farmers in Bedford County in a barn south of Flat Creek.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1415921/7706832/468927790?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGFiOTBkOC1kODcwLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM2ODEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YIhWlbj1y5z_p_756qJFNNPhGNPudoYktXTJInGqd0M=&refcode=em180615-MM5-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&recurring=true)
They’re a proud group continuing a fine Tennessee tradition, and they’ve worked hard for their success. But like a lot of folks in our state, they’re worried about the dysfunction and rancor in Washington producing policies that could hurt their business, and businesses across our state.
I know nowadays, this kind of worry isn’t all that unusual. That’s exactly why I’m applying to be your next U.S. Senator -- so we can put an end to the hyper-partisanship that’s seizing Washington, and get Congress to focus on getting things done for working people. We need to get this done.
[**We have a major fundraising deadline tonight -- can you pitch in $5 or whatever you can to help get it done? Your support is why we’re able to run a campaign like this: focused on Tennesseans and what matters most to them.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1415922/7706833/912624268?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGFiOTBkOC1kODcwLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM2ODEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YIhWlbj1y5z_p_756qJFNNPhGNPudoYktXTJInGqd0M=&refcode=em180615-MM5-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&recurring=true)
**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1415923/7706834/912624268?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGFiOTBkOC1kODcwLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM2ODEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YIhWlbj1y5z_p_756qJFNNPhGNPudoYktXTJInGqd0M=&refcode=em180615-MM5-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&recurring=true)**
Right now, these folks are most worried about the tariffs being pushed by leaders in Washington. They know these tariffs are like slapping a new tax on businesses and consumers, and that they’ll drive up prices, hurt our economy and cost us jobs.
And while a group of both Republicans and Democrats are trying to turn these tariffs around before they do real damage, Congressional leaders are already going to their old partisan playbook to block this effort.
**This is a perfect example of the dysfunction and hyper-partisanship running our government. And it just goes to show you why campaigns like ours are so important.**
[**Pitch in $5, or whatever you can, to support our campaign ahead of tonight’s deadline and show the Washington establishment we’re ready to end their partisan games.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1415924/7706835/912624268?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGFiOTBkOC1kODcwLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM2ODEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YIhWlbj1y5z_p_756qJFNNPhGNPudoYktXTJInGqd0M=&refcode=em180615-MM5-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&recurring=true)
**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1415925/7706836/912624268?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGFiOTBkOC1kODcwLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM2ODEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YIhWlbj1y5z_p_756qJFNNPhGNPudoYktXTJInGqd0M=&refcode=em180615-MM5-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&recurring=true)**
I know we’re not going to change the way Washington works overnight. But I know that if we work together, we can carry our momentum to Election Day and make a meaningful difference.
Thanks for all you do,
—Phil Bredesen

name: Zephyr Teachout
subject: The Trump Foundation lawsuit
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
The board, which includes three of his children, hadn't even met in 19 years.
#
Peter -
Yesterday, New York Attorney General Barbara Underwood filed a lawsuit against the Trump Foundation for "persistently illegal conduct."
**Put simply: Trump 's foundation was a sham operation that he used as a personal piggy bank.**
The foundation's board, which includes three of his children, hadn't even met in 19 years. The treasurer didn't realize he was on the board. There was literally no oversight.
It is outrageous that they were allowed to operate this scam openly, unchecked for decades. So why did it take so long for us to seek justice?
Because for too long, elected officials have looked the other way when it benefited their own interests. It's not isolated to Trump either. Real estate, big money and political power are way too cozy in New York.
This is the type of corruption the New York Attorney General should be going after, and that's exactly what I will do if I have the honor to serve. But I need your help to make it possible:
**[Can you make a $3 donation right now? We depend on grassroots supporters like you to fund our campaign. Together, we will win and root out the corruption poisoning our politics.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e09/6e822e2f/1b5f0705/41726a42/555634806/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA2MTUtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-june?refcode=em180615-full")**
This lawsuit provides evidence that Trump used charitable assets to settle lawsuits on behalf of his businesses, promote his hotels and support his own campaign.
Among the allegations were a donation to a political group supporting Florida's AG who was considering a lawsuit against Trump University at the time, the purchase of a self-portrait to hang in one of his golf clubs, and donations made on behalf of his campaign at campaign events.
If some of that sounds familiar, it's because that was all publicly reported on in 2016. Donald Trump's corruption has been happening right in front of our eyes all along.
Despite knowing all of this, the New York AG investigation had been open for 20 months. Now within six weeks of taking office, Attorney General Underwood has filed a lawsuit.
That is the kind of swift, independent action that we need in this moment in our history. It is the Attorney General's obligation to aggressively investigate corruption wherever it may exist -- including from the president, his family and his businesses.
This is exactly the type of leadership and independence you can expect from me as Attorney General. I will be a check on the corrupt elites who have rigged our system for their own benefit.
**[If you can, please chip in $3 today. Together, we can beat the powerful people and wealthy interests who want to stop us.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e09/6e822e2f/1b5f0705/41726a42/555634806/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA2MTUtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-june?refcode=em180615-full")**
Thank you in advance for your support.
Best,
Zephyr Teachout

clean_body: The board, which includes three of his children, hadn't even met in 19 years. Peter - Yesterday, New York Attorney General Barbara Underwood filed a lawsuit against the Trump Foundation for "persistently illegal conduct." Put simply: Trump 's foundation was a sham operation that he used as a personal piggy bank. The foundation's board, which includes three of his children, hadn't even met in 19 years. The treasurer didn't realize he was on the board. There was literally no oversight. It is outrageous that they were allowed to operate this scam openly, unchecked for decades. So why did it take so long for us to seek justice? Because for too long, elected officials have looked the other way when it benefited their own interests. It's not isolated to Trump either. Real estate, big money and political power are way too cozy in New York. This is the type of corruption the New York Attorney General should be going after, and that's exactly what I will do if I have the honor to serve. But I need your help to make it possible: "" This lawsuit provides evidence that Trump used charitable assets to settle lawsuits on behalf of his businesses, promote his hotels and support his own campaign. Among the allegations were a donation to a political group supporting Florida's AG who was considering a lawsuit against Trump University at the time, the purchase of a self-portrait to hang in one of his golf clubs, and donations made on behalf of his campaign at campaign events. If some of that sounds familiar, it's because that was all publicly reported on in 2016. Donald Trump's corruption has been happening right in front of our eyes all along. name: betofortexas.com
subject: 11.5 million Texans under the age of 65
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
#
The stakes of this election couldn't be clearer, team:
The Trump administration just doubled down on attacking healthcare, working quickly to end protections for those with pre-existing conditions. While members of Congress from BOTH parties are pushing back and fighting to safeguard these critical protections, one senator is going all in on repealing our healthcare.**It's Ted Cruz.**
According to _ABC News_ , ONE Republican senator so far has signaled he's supportive of the lawsuit that would gut protections for those with pre-existing conditions: the junior senator from the state of Texas.
[**It's time we repeal Ted Cruz and replace him with a senator who will fight for universal healthcare so every Texan can see a doctor and get the care they need. Pitch in $3 today to protect those with pre-existing conditions and send Beto to the Senate.**](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb921c4/3b1d797/786adb65/35a9bb12/792143027/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bo-180615-hc?refcode=ema180615")
Going after protections for those with pre-existing conditions is just about as dangerous of a position as you can take. While Texas already leads the country in the rate of uninsured individuals, it's also a state where HALF of those adults under the age of 65 have pre-existing conditions. That's more than 11.5 million Texans. Only one state in the nation has a greater amount.
**Unfortunately, this is what we've come to expect from Ted Cruz.**
* First, he shut down the United States government for 16 days in 2013 by declaring, "I intend to speak in support of defunding Obamacare until I am no longer able to stand."
* Then, he spent last summer leading the charge to take away healthcare from those with pre-existing conditions. Thanks to you and those across the country, we stopped it.
* Now, he's refusing to protect those he was sworn to serve, instead working to repeal their healthcare and harm the well-being of millions of Texans.

[**We have to stop Ted Cruz. If we don't, we're handing him six more years to attack our healthcare. Pitch in today to help our grassroots campaign elect a senator who is proud to say that every Texan should be able to see a doctor and receive the care they need, not as a function of luck or circumstance but as a fundamental right.**](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb921c4/3b1d797/786adb65/35a9bb12/792143027/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bo-180615-hc?refcode=ema180615")
Thanks for saving healthcare,
Team Beto
**[Donate $3](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb921c4/3b1d797/786adb65/35a9bb12/792143027/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bo-180615-hc?refcode=ema180615")**

* * *
Paid for by Beto for Texas
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here.](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb921c4/3b1d797/786adb65/35a9bb13/792143027/VEsC/ "http://action.betofortexas.com/page/s/fewer-emails") [ Click here to update your contact information.](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb921c4/3b1d797/786adb65/35a9bb14/792143027/VEsD/ "https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/s/update-your-information") [Click here to unsubscribe.](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb921c4/3b1d797/786adb65/35a9bb15/792143027/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://secure.betofortexas.com/page/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas campaign, P.O. name: Bob Casey
subject: it's all at risk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e66f9/51dbcc2a/6c20456/3a58684/2186676430/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/")

This is important, and time is running out. **Our match deadline ends in just a few hours, and we are still $4,150 short of our goal.**

Ever since I voted against the GOP's anti-middle-class tax plan, Republicans have been coming after me _hard_. Big Republican donors have dedicated hundreds of millions of dollars to unseat Democrats just like me this year, and they show no signs of stopping. The President is already actively involved in this race, attacking me on Twitter and promising to campaign "very, very hard" for my opponent right here in Pennsylvania.

I cannot stress how serious this is, team. If we lose Pennsylvania's only Democratic Senate seat, Medicare, Medicaid, Social Security and affordable health care are all at risk. My opponent, Congressman Barletta, already votes with the President 99% of the time -- he will continue to rubber-stamp the President's agenda, no matter how damaging it may be to middle-class families here at home.

We need to stop them, and we have to have the resources to do it. **But we only have until midnight to have every gift doubled: Will you donate $5 or more right now -- before the match expires -- to protect Pennsylvania's Democratic Senate seat?**

**Here's the link:**[**_secure.bobcasey.com/MATCH_**](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180615_fr1_nd_rem&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

I really appreciate you coming through at this crucial time.

Bob

| | Bob needs a strong team to help keep this Senate seat blue so he can continue to protect Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security, fight for working families and be a check on the Trump Administration.

Will you make your first donation to help out?
[DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180615_fr1_nd_rem&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: We are now Red to Blue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
Good afternoon Peter,

It's been just three days since our June 12th primary and already we have more **incredible news to report**. The Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee (DCCC) has put us on their "Red to Blue" list, a highly-competitive program that DCCC uses to arm their top-tier candidates with the tools to win. This designation affirms that we are one of the **most flippable races nationwide**.

As we build up for the general election in five short months, could you help us build our foundation by making a **[donation today](https://act.myngp.com/el/4_iOjlHwszfX-YYQZqgA6Q1NDQKI1mpEb8DlKhhXRTs=/1tdDW_TP2DanjFM1I50rOFWN9DXbpdVmYaVjOfV_Gy8=?refcode=redtoblue)**?

In their release, the DCCC wrote the following:
_" Despite facing a strong and well-funded Democratic challenger, Abigail Spanberger demonstrated her strength with a commanding first place finish in Virginia's primary. Spanberger has worked hard in her district to earn a spot on Red to Blue by surpassing aggressive goals for grassroots engagement, local support, campaign organization and fundraising. Beyond her demonstrated abilities to build a winning campaign infrastructure, Spanberger has deep roots in the community and an inspiring, persuasive message about her commitment to service and putting her constituents first that helped propel her to a dominant win in a competitive Democratic primary."_
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/4_iOjlHwszfX-YYQZqgA6Q1NDQKI1mpEb8DlKhhXRTs=/1tdDW_TP2DanjFM1I50rOFWN9DXbpdVmYaVjOfV_Gy8=?refcode=redtoblue)
With your support, we will win this race.

Thank you,

Abigail

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/4_iOjlHwszfX-YYQZqgA6Q1NDQKI1mpEb8DlKhhXRTs=/TzHIYL0KOKHL953dzCJFMubV0Oju_i2ZdVRk8oa7Dro=)

_Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/4_iOjlHwszfX-YYQZqgA6Q1NDQKI1mpEb8DlKhhXRTs=/F_pocehu31bj_GHkMTHfyDd7NKCHB76lgjNErDn8oWk=)_

Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
---
Spanberger for Congress
PO Box 3121
Glen Allen VA 23058 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/4_iOjlHwszfX-YYQZqgA6Q1NDQKI1mpEb8DlKhhXRTs=/2QIOl4l_qRWbUmDHxuh_uXbFZbKfCbRMDflnpZM4fNw=).

---

| | **Peter: a new poll shows Joe can win this race, but Mitch McConnell 's super PAC just announced they're pouring another _$1,000,000.00_ into Indiana to defeat him!**

**" OUT OF STATE GROUPS LAUNCH ATTACKS ON JOE!"** | **[**DONATE TO THE FIGHT BACK FUND >>**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2e61/7377f838/3c77a67e/51f935e9/2498813476/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-fbf?refcode=20180615.1nd&amount=10")**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Steve=20Smith?=
subject: Breaking News About a Major Endorsement
body:
Please share this important news. -- | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/stevesmithaz.com/borderpatrolcouncil-2666343?e=1fa29a1af8)
---
| |
---
|
# Great News from the Campaign Trail.

## I wanted you to see this press release about my latest endorsement helping build momentum to make sure that "Mr. Smith Goes to Washington." \-- Steve
______________________________________
---
|
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
Friday, June 15, 2018
Contact: Jordan Kittleson, [ Jordan@SteveSmithAZ.com](mailto:Jordan@SteveSmithAZ.com)
---
| | **NATIONAL BORDER PATROL COUNCIL
ENDORSES STEVE SMITH FOR CONGRESS** **Maricopa, AZ** – The National Border Patrol Council, representing some 18,000 rank-and-file Border Patrol agents and support personnel, issued a letter this week endorsing Steve Smith in the Republican Primary in Arizona's First Congressional District. The letter, dated June 11, 2018, was signed by NBPC President Brandon Judd, and appears to be the first time that the organization has issued an endorsement in a partisan Primary Election for a seat in the U.S. House.

In 2016, the NBPC endorsed Donald J. Trump for president in the group's first ever endorsement in a Presidential Election, and earlier this year they endorsed Senator Ted Cruz in his reelection bid for the U.S. Senate.

In their endorsement letter the NBPC praised Steve Smith's record of advocating for strong border security and support for those tasked with guarding our borders, during his tenure as a member of the Arizona State Senate, citing several specific examples of Senator Smith's commitment to border security.

"We are convinced that you will continue to be a staunch advocate in support of border enforcement and that you will continue to listen to rank-and-file Border Patrol agents as you carry out your duties in Congress," the letter stated. It went on to say; "Many politicians say they will do things before elections and then promptly forget many of their promises after the election. You are the rare person who carries through on your election cycle commitments without apology or fear."

In response to the NBPC endorsement, Steve Smith said; "I am honored to be included with President Trump and Senator Cruz as one of the few people to receive an endorsement from the National Border Patrol Council. I am committed to living up to the high expectations and trust placed in me by the brave men and women who guard the gates of freedom. I won't let them down."

Smith’s candidacy continues to attract support from an array of nationally recognized, conservative leaders including endorsements from Senator Ted Cruz, Representative Andy Biggs, Representative Debbie Lesko, former Arizona State Treasurer and Trump Campaign COO Jeff DeWit, Former Arizona Attorney General and Past President of the NRA Bob Corbin, the last three GOP CD1 nominees (Andy Tobin, Jonathan Paton, and Paul Babeu), Arizona Senate and House Leadership, and many more.

A copy of the NBPC endorsement letter [can be found here.](https://SteveSmithAZ.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=744cc59eec9e4f21a849aa145&id=7674e92032&e=1fa29a1af8) # # #

name: Jay Inslee
subject: The Trump administration is crushing our health care
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Thanks to Trump, we can expect a 19% increase in premium rates this year.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79359/2f5ea88d/70afd965/2cbcf210/1135117708/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mid-month-june-inslee?utm_source=ema_2018-06-15_mid-month-1&refcode=ema_2018-06-15_mid-month-1&utm_campaign=mid-month-1&utm_medium=ema") Friend, For months, health care experts have warned us. The Trump administration's health care policies only mean one thing: **Higher insurance rates for all of us -- here in Washington and nationwide.** We knew that the very "reforms" pushed by Trump and Republicans in Congress -- repealing the individual mandate, refusing to pay cost-sharing subsidies, allowing for short-term minimalist plans, and now attacking access for those with pre-existing conditions -- would result in far fewer Americans with health care coverage. But now it's clear that the Republicans are hurting even those people with coverage, by sending health care premiums through the roof. [**We fought hard with President Obama for the _Affordable Care Act_. But Republicans are crushing our chances at fair, affordable care for all Americans. I need you to step up now and show that you're ready to defend our nation's health care. Chip in to show you're on my team.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79359/2f5ea88d/70afd965/2cbcf210/1135117708/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mid-month-june-inslee?utm_source=ema_2018-06-15_mid-month-1&refcode=ema_2018-06-15_mid-month-1&utm_campaign=mid-month-1&utm_medium=ema") Here's what we're seeing: Eleven health insurers, in 74 health plans proposed for Washington's 2019 health insurance market, are planning to increase rates by an average of 19%. 19% across the board. That's a lot more money to spend on health care, and it will definitely make it harder for Washington families to pay the bills and access care. | [THAT'S NOT RIGHT »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79359/2f5ea88d/70afd965/2cbcf210/1135117708/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mid-month-june-inslee?utm_source=ema_2018-06-15_mid-month-1&refcode=ema_2018-06-15_mid-month-1&utm_campaign=mid-month-1&utm_medium=ema")
---
So what's to blame for this rate hike? The Trump administration's plans have sent insurance markets into chaos, and when insurers get scared, they pass the cost onto all of us.
Just this month, when Jeff Sessions announced that the Justice Department would not defend the _Affordable Care Act_ in court, he threw into question the future for millions of Americans with pre-existing conditions. And not only did he put our most vulnerable at risk -- he caused waves in the insurance markets as well.
Look, here in Washington, we will continue to do everything we can to provide affordable options for consumers. But ultimately Congress has to do its part to protect our care.
Americans need stability and affordability in health insurance, not the chaos caused by the Trump administration. That's why we need bold leadership that will defend health care as a right, not a privilege.
[**Before our mid-month deadline on Saturday, make your voice heard: Chip in $5 or more to show that you stand with the progressive movement to defend affordable health care for all.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79359/2f5ea88d/70afd965/2cbcf210/1135117708/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mid-month-june-inslee?utm_source=ema_2018-06-15_mid-month-1&refcode=ema_2018-06-15_mid-month-1&utm_campaign=mid-month-1&utm_medium=ema")
Very truly yours,
Jay Inslee
[CHIP IN »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79359/2f5ea88d/70afd965/2cbcf210/1135117708/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mid-month-june-inslee?utm_source=ema_2018-06-15_mid-month-1&refcode=ema_2018-06-15_mid-month-1&utm_campaign=mid-month-1&utm_medium=ema")
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79359/2f5ea88d/70afd965/2cbcf217/1135117708/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). name: Team Cooper
subject: Not off our coast...

body:
Roy is fighting for us and standing up to Republicans in Washington D.C. and the Trump administration against offshore drilling. Let him know you have his back -- add your name here.
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203a21/2fde7c66/46ad3665/15683448/3064953283/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/add-your-name-not-off-our-coast?gpsid=8_43_1308&source=em18_180615_drill2_adv_gq_ful__TC&utm_campaign=em18_180615_drill2_adv_gq_ful__TC&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=1")

Not off our coast, friend.

That's what Roy told the Trump administration last year when they wanted to open our coast for offshore drilling and gas exploration.

He said it again earlier this year when he met with Interior Secretary Ryan Zinke at the governor's mansion, surrounded by a bipartisan mix of community leaders and elected officials.

And he said it again yesterday when he teamed up with a group of governors to stand against Washington D.C. Republicans' extortion tactics for offshore drilling.

[**Roy is fighting for us and standing up to Republicans in Washington D.C. and the Trump administration against offshore drilling. Let him know you have his back -- add your name here.**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203a21/2fde7c66/46ad3665/1568344b/3064953283/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/add-your-name-not-off-our-coast?gpsid=8_43_1308&source=em18_180615_drill2_adv_gq_ful__TC&utm_campaign=em18_180615_drill2_adv_gq_ful__TC&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=2+-+Roy+is+fighting+for+us+and+standing+up+t")

This is too important to sit on the sidelines, friend.

More than 30 coastal communities in North Carolina have passed resolutions opposing offshore drilling -- joining nearly 200 businesses and community groups that have stepped up against it.

Let Roy know you have his back: **[Add your name here.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203a21/2fde7c66/46ad3665/1568344a/3064953283/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/add-your-name-not-off-our-coast?gpsid=8_43_1308&source=em18_180615_drill2_adv_gq_ful__TC&utm_campaign=em18_180615_drill2_adv_gq_ful__TC&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=3+-+Add+your+name+here")**

Thanks for your support,

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dr.=20Paul=20Gosar?=
subject: Will you help me and President Trump?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paul Gosar for Congress
body:
Big money Special Interests and liberal Washington politicians are trying to pressure President Trump to grant amnesty – and no Border Wall. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/eab2d7f8f37d/will-you-help-me-and-president-trump?e=7ca82c1e3d)
---
| |
---
| |
To all my patriotic friends,

Big money Special Interests and liberal Washington politicians are trying to pressure President Trump to grant amnesty through DACA – without funding the Border Wall.

Well, I plan to stand with President Trump. I will oppose DACA, and I refuse to budge until we get funding for the wall. As someone sworn to preserve and protect our Constitution, I will not let our nation’s sovereignty be jeopardized by a “deal” among special interests that grants full citizenship to people in this country illegally. People who want to jump in front of the line – ahead of those who came to America legally – and who respect our laws.

_**My strong position in support of President Trump and his tough border policies has earned me a lot of criticism.**_ Corporate Republicans, special interest lobbyists, and even the fake news Arizona Republic have been actively working to unseat me. The Arizona Republic even tried to recruit a candidate against me in the Republican primary!

I’m not going to bend to the political pressure of the Special Interests and the Arizona Republic.

_**June 30th is the next Campaign Finance Deadline.**_ This is the last report before the Primary Election and a critical show of strength. If our opponents think we are weak – they will strike!

So, I’m writing you today to ask for a donation to our campaign. [Can you help with $25, $100, $250, $500, or even the maximum $2,700?](https://gosar4congress.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d959b13e61e10f809478ff16&id=c609cbbded&e=7ca82c1e3d) Every donation helps us to fund the flyers, Facebook ads, and campaign staff. And I need your support.

If you promise to help our team, I promise to keep fighting!
####
---
|
---
| Dr. Paul Gosar
Member of Congress
Arizona's 4th District
