Well, I plan to stand with President Trump. I will oppose DACA, and I refuse to budge until we get funding for the wall. As someone sworn to preserve and protect our Constitution, I will not let our nation’s sovereignty be jeopardized by a “deal” among special interests that grants full citizenship to people in this country illegally. People who want to jump in front of the line – ahead of those who came to America legally – and who respect our laws. My strong position in support of President Trump and his tough border policies has earned me a lot of criticism. Corporate Republicans, special interest lobbyists, and even the fake news Arizona Republic have been actively working to unseat me. The Arizona Republic even tried to recruit a candidate against me in the Republican primary! I’m not going to bend to the political pressure of the Special Interests and the Arizona Republic. June 30th is the next Campaign Finance Deadline. This is the last report before the Primary Election and a critical show of strength. If our opponents think we are weak – they will strike! So, I’m writing you today to ask for a donation to our campaign. Every donation helps us to fund the flyers, Facebook ads, and campaign staff. And I need your support. If you promise to help our team, I promise to keep fighting! | | Dr. Paul Gosar Member of Congress Arizona's 4th District | "Donate" | | | | | | | | | | | www.drpaulgosar.com | | Paid for by Paul Gosar for Congress | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Paul Gosar for Congress PO Box 2967 Prescontt, AZ 86302 * USA

#
Hey Peter --
I wanted to get one more message into your inbox about tonight’s deadline.
Thanks to the outpouring of support we’ve gotten from grassroots supporters like you, we know that our campaign is making a lot of people in the Washington establishment angry. They don’t like that Governor Bredesen is challenging the status quo, and they have the money (from out-of-state mega donors) to give us a tough fight in this race.
**But Governor Bredesen doesn’t want this campaign to be focused on all that -- he wants this campaign focused on Tennesseans who want to fix the mess in Washington.**
Our campaign is open to anyone who is tired of the partisan squabbling and wants to bring common sense leadership to Congress. And I know if we have resources to put our message in front of voters we can get this done. **So I’m asking you:**

subject: The way forward:
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3055/9e00690/460fc5c7/24022c7d/4269778742/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180616_debate_fnd_gq_act_MM_BmP&source=em18_180616_debate_fnd_gq_act_MM_BmP")
Friends,

Working people have fallen further and further behind under Governor Rick Scott. Thankfully, we have the chance to elect a leader who will put working Floridians first again in November -- but before that, we need to pick the right leader to represent us in August.

After this week's debates though, that leader has become clear: If Democrats truly want to take back the Governor's mansion this November, we need to elect Andrew Gillum this August. **[Can we count on you to chip in $5 now?](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3055/9e00690/460fc5c7/24022c7c/4269778742/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-june-midmonth?gpsid=13_55_1321&refcode=em18_180616_debate_fnd_gq_act_MM_BmP&utm_campaign=em18_180616_debate_fnd_gq_act_MM_BmP&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=2+-+Can+we+count+on+you+to+chip+in++ask++now")**

"https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-june-midmonth?gpsid=13_55_1321&refcode=em18_180616_debate_fnd_gq_act_MM_BmP&utm_campaign=em18_180616_debate_fnd_gq_act_MM_BmP&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&express_lane=true&amount=200&utm_content=6+-+Express+Donate++ask4+") From having the strongest record on gun safety, to giving our teachers and staff the raises they deserve, and calling for an end to "Stand Your Ground" laws, Andrew was head and shoulders above the other candidates with his plans to fight for the issues and values that we care about most. But now, with less than 80 days left before the August primary, we need your help.

Andrew is the only non-millionaire Democrat running for Governor, but this campaign believes you shouldn't have to be one to represent the people of this state. So to rebuild our state into one that works for everyone, we need to make sure we elect a true progressive champion like Andrew to represent us this August.

**[There's too much at stake to not do everything we can to elect Andrew Gillum to represent us this August -- so chip in $5 now.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3055/9e00690/460fc5c7/24022c72/4269778742/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-june-midmonth?gpsid=13_55_1321&refcode=em18_180616_debate_fnd_gq_act_MM_BmP&utm_campaign=em18_180616_debate_fnd_gq_act_MM_BmP&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=8+-+Therersquos+too+much+at+stake+to+not+do+")**

Brendan McPhillips

Andrew Gillum for Governor

**NH REPUBLICAN PARTY**
**WEEKLY NEWSLETTER**
**FRIDAY, JUNE 15th**
|
---
**_A Note From Jeanie_**
Dear Derek,

This past week Vice President Pence addressed the 161st session of the Southern Baptist Convention. In his remarks, the Vice President said the real source of America’s greatness is in the work of its people. I agree wholeheartedly.
To take it a step further, I believe the source of New Hampshire’s greatness is in the work of our Republican elected officials.
By all accounts, New Hampshire is leading when it comes to the progress we’ve made on our economy. More people are working than ever before, we have the fastest growing economy in New England, the lowest poverty rate in the nation, the highest median income, and our business tax revenue is exceeding expectations.
But folks, our work is not done and that’s why we need to make sure our Republican slate in the House and Senate are filled with Republicans who will continue with the progress we’ve made.
Time is running out! If you haven’t filed to run for office, today is the deadline. If you miss the deadline, call our office at 225-9341 and let us know—if the seat isn’t filled, we can still get you on the ballot by next Wednesday.
Please join with others who have stepped up to assure that New Hampshire continues making progress!

Sincerely,

Jeanie
**Join the Grassroots Circle!**

**The Grassroots Circle is a unique way for you to get involved while supporting the Party.**

**Becoming a member couldn't be easier -- join today for as little as $10 per month. There are three levels of support: The Grassroots Supporter, the NHGOP Advocate and the VIP Investor.**

clean_body: | | nh.gop NH REPUBLICAN PARTY WEEKLY NEWSLETTER FRIDAY, JUNE 15th | A Note From Jeanie Dear Derek, This past week Vice President Pence addressed the 161st session of the Southern Baptist Convention. In his remarks, the Vice President said the real source of America’s greatness is in the work of its people. I agree wholeheartedly. To take it a step further, I believe the source of New Hampshire’s greatness is in the work of our Republican elected officials. By all accounts, New Hampshire is leading when it comes to the progress we’ve made on our economy. More people are working than ever before, we have the fastest growing economy in New England, the lowest poverty rate in the nation, the highest median income, and our business tax revenue is exceeding expectations. But folks, our work is not done and that’s why we need to make sure our Republican slate in the House and Senate are filled with Republicans who will continue with the progress we’ve made. Time is running out! If you haven’t filed to run for office, today is the deadline. If you miss the deadline, call our office at 225-9341 and let us know—if the seat isn’t filled, we can still get you on the ballot by next Wednesday. Please join with others who have stepped up to assure that New Hampshire continues making progress! Sincerely, Jeanie Join the Grassroots Circle! The Grassroots Circle is a unique way for you to get involved while supporting the Party. Becoming a member couldn't be easier -- join today for as little as $10 per month. There are three levels of support: The Grassroots Supporter, the NHGOP Advocate and the VIP Investor. Intern with the NH GOP! Are you a student or know a student that is interested in Politics? ** Learn the skills necessary to win elections and meet the Republican leaders that govern our State and write legislation. PRIORITIES TAX REFORM SPECIFICS EVENT SPOTLIGHTS UPCOMING EVENTS PHOTO OF THE WEEK The great group of NHGOP Activists at our Trump Birthday party last night in Salem! REPUBLICAN SPOTLIGHT Our Republican Spotlight this week is Representative Carl Seidel! Carl is one of only 16 people in the United States honored to be designated as one of the Albert Nelson Marquis Lifetime Achievement Award recipients, which is based upon career longevity, philanthropic endeavors and lasting contributions to our society! Congratulations and thank you for all you do! TWEET** OF THE WEEK Tweet With Us! | | VIDEO OF SENATE PRESIDENT MORSE AT RED TOWN HALL RNC LAUNCHES "PAYCHECK PRESIDENT" WEBSITE House Speaker Gene Chandler Website "FOLLOW" on Twitter "LIKE" on Facebook Senate President Chuck Morse Website "FOLLOW" on Twitter "LIKE" on Facebook Executive Council Website "FOLLOW" on Twitter "LIKE" on Facebook Governor Chris Sununu Web - "LIKE" on Facebook - "FOLLOW" on Twitter - Web - Facebook - Twitter - Chairman Jeanie Forrester "LIKE" on Facebook - "FOLLOW" on Twitter - 10 Water Street, Concord, NH 03301 Phone: tel:6032259341 "tel:6032259341" | Email: mailto:info@nhgop.org "info@nhgop.org" • • mailto:info@nhgop.org "info@nhgop.org" | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Republican Party of New Hampshire 10 Water Street Concord New Hampshire 03301

We still have another $2,800 to reach our mid-June fundraising goal: otherwise, we'll have to cut our campaign budget for resources we cannot afford to lose.

That means that as President Trump's powerful allies continue to come after Bob with lies and smears, we won't have the means to fight back. With the president's sights set on Pennsylvania this year, we have to be prepared to respond to attacks straight away, but ad time is expensive and ours is on the chopping block.

**By helping us reach our goal, you will put Bob one step closer to keeping this Senate seat so he can continue his fight for every Pennsylvanian. Just $5 is a huge help in this fight.**

| | **CNN: "Democrats' hopes reside in [Nevada]" >>> [Give now to flip Nevada blue and take back the Senate!](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd796/4fbb2af3/704ec7d9/5e8bac0d/2550924144/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azc1OS1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=jtk759-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

Friends - **with the future of the Supreme Court and Obamacare on the line this fall, things are not looking good in Nevada, the state that Nate Silver's _FiveThirtyEight_ says will help decide Senate control. **

President Trump pledged to campaign in Nevada for GOP Senator Dean Heller just months after a Mitch McConnell-linked Super PAC promised _millions_ to protect his seat.

And now, **a recent poll shows Democrats are down by one point **in the Senate race that CNN says is THE seat most likely to flip parties in 2018.

**EVERYTHING IS AT STAKE.**

**That's why we need to hit our critical $20,000 mid-month goal, but with time running out, we're still falling WAY short.**
[**Friends, we need you to give everything you can right now before our mid-month deadline at midnight to flip Nevada blue and take back the Senate:**](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd796/4fbb2af3/704ec7d9/5e8bac0d/2550924144/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azc1OS1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=jtk759-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network. Please add us to your address book to make sure you keep receiving updates.

Emails are an important way for us to stay in touch with our supporters. 95% of our contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200 - and without that support, Democrats will lose our best opportunity to take back the Senate this November.

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd796/4fbb2af3/704ec7d9/5e8bac09/2550924144/VEsB/p/eyJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=email_footer&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500"). name: Peter Hanscom
subject: FWD: McConnell is attacking Joe

body:
You really need to see this note from earlier today. Mitch McConnell's super PAC just launched a new attack on Joe. |
---

| | You really need to see this note from earlier today, Peter:

Mitch McConnell's super PAC just launched a new attack on Joe, and **[we need the resources to fight back.](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2e6c/7377f838/3c71cbda/51f933b9/2863505377/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-fbf?refcode=20180615.2nd&amount=10")**

**If you 've already stepped up, thank you. If you haven't yet, NOW is the time.**

Joe will never stop fighting for Hoosiers -- whether it's protecting health care, Social Security, or our veterans, he always has our backs. Today, we need to have his.

We can beat Rep. Braun and all of his special interest allies, but we need your help. **Please contribute whatever you can to our Fight Back Fund before midnight tonight.** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Energy
body:
Energetic is the only word that can describe the momentum we're experiencing now as Republicans. Coming out of our 2018 Indiana Republican State... | | |
---
| |
---
| **_Energy_** Energetic is the only word that can describe the momentum we're experiencing now as Republicans! Coming out of our 2018 Indiana Republican State Convention in Evansville, we're motivated and working as one, unified team toward victory throughout the state in November.

A few quick observations on our momentum following convention:
* We now officially have our all-star, all-female statewide team of **Secretary of State Connie Lawson** , **Treasurer Kelly Mitchell** , and **Auditor Tera Klutz** in place.
* A new poll came out this month that shows [44 percent of Hoosiers](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=aa237b0573&e=1acd9bb3d6) think Democrat Joe Donnelly doesn't deserve re-election, and that it's time to replace him with someone new. Even fewer Hoosiers say they're planning to actually vote for Democrat Donnelly.
* And that's while conservative outsider **Mike Braun** continues to pick up support statewide following convention, including meeting with Hoosiers and [launching his first TV ad](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=756154b177&e=1acd9bb3d6) of the general election campaign.

As Republicans, it's critical that we keep this momentum alive. The ball is in our court, and we've got the full team playing offense. And, I have to tell you, that team is reaching record proportions this year.

Our field program is staffed up (with 27 Hoosiers...and growing...out there talking to voters). With the financial support of **Senator Todd Young** , we've also got a full slate of 33 college interns in place throughout the state. Together, this next generation of Hoosier Republican leaders is hard at work.

But our record-setting team doesn't stop there. And that's because of you. Hoosier Republicans in all corners of Indiana, from Lake County to Clark County, from Steuben County to our convention host of Vanderburgh County and everywhere in between, are living this energy day-in and day-out. You're working hard, and you are taking the energy from Evansville to your home communities across the state.

You are are the energy of our Indiana Republican Party, and together, we'll translate that energy into votes and campaign wins for our full Republican team. -Kyle Hupfer

_Pictured: Last Friday, Chairman Kyle Hupfer stood on stage with our full Indiana Republican Party ticket to help kick-off this year's 2018 Indiana Republican State Convention in Evansville. _
---
| |
---
| | **_Governor Holcomb's Week That Was_**
---
|
---
|
---
---
| **_New Jobs & New Hope in Fort Wayne_** This Wednesday, **Governor Eric Holcomb** had a busy day in Fort Wayne! It was exciting to first watch as he [welcomed one of the nation's largest milk processing plants](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=08f86bfe6f&e=1acd9bb3d6) to Indiana, a state that's a leader in both agriculture and logistics! Operated by Walmart, this 250,000-square-foot, state-of-the-art plant will be responsible for creating up to 300 new Hoosier jobs!

Next, [he attended the opening](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=036812cf0e&e=1acd9bb3d6) of Fort Wayne's new opioid treatment center, the Bowen Recovery Center. This new center is another step to make sure that Hoosiers are within an hour's drive (or less) of help and treatment.

And then, of course, Governor Holcomb couldn't leave Fort Wayne without making an unannounced stop with **Chairman Kyle Hupfer** to thank hardworking precinct committeemen at a party meeting in Allen County!

Indiana's forward momentum continues, with Governor Holcomb at the helm!
---
|
---
| | **_The Mike Braun Corner_**
---
|
---
|
---
---
| **_Hoosiers Rally Around Braun!_**
U.S. Senate candidate **Mike Braun** had a big showing last weekend at the 2018 Indiana Republican State Convention! Hoosier Republicans from all over rallied in full support of sending a conservative outsider to the Senate...giving President Trump another critical reinforcement in Washington.

And it came during another bad week for Democrat Joe Donnelly. That's because Democrat Donnelly flip-flopped his position, like he frequently does, this time on North Korea.

While President Donald Trump has been working hard to secure a denuclearization agreement with North Korea, last September Democrat Donnelly gave what the [Indianapolis Star called a "blistering critique"](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c6744efd45&e=1acd9bb3d6) of President Trump's strategy on the Korean Peninsula. And then this week, he shifted his position, claiming that he now "supports President Trump and his administration’s stated goal."

With your help, this November let's send in a U.S. Senator who has President Trump's back! Let's elect Mike Braun, and send Democrat Donnelly packing!
---
|
---
| | **_National Day of Action_**
---
|
---
| **_Join Hoosiers this Saturday to Take Action!_**
Tomorrow, join Republicans across the country for the National Day of Action!

Here in Indiana, we're organizing training sessions statewide to help volunteers build campaign leadership skills...and then we'll go out and talk to voters about our candidates and the issues that matter most to Hoosiers.

Check out the [full list of 17 events statewide here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b49e46f9c5&e=1acd9bb3d6), and RSVP for the location closest to you! We'll see you tomorrow!
---
|
---
| _**News You Can Use**_
**Governor Eric Holcomb** [receives federal approval for workforce cabinet](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=29886aaf7c&e=1acd9bb3d6) **Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch** [speaks to clerk’s conference in South Bend](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f5525b796e&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Secretary of State Connie Lawson** [shares state convention video](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1aa8f5d67b&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Treasurer Kelly Mitchell** [meets with Hamilton County dispatchers](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=cba2e5e7a8&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Auditor Tera Klutz** [talks about her time in Evansville last weekend](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7716ada985&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Superintendent Jennifer McCormick** [talks with school administrators in Kokomo](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=52e2b72a41&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Sen. Todd Young **[presents affordable housing award](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6ec32bdcd2&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Jackie Walorski** [spends time with the Indiana Youth Tour delegation](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b9d89d6fdd&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Jim Banks **[discusses issues important to Hoosier truckers](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0872b1e76c&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Todd Rokita**[supports** ** the fight against the opioid epidemic](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d97f9ed0a8&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Susan Brooks **[m](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8e70a98aeb&e=1acd9bb3d6)[eets with students from her alma mater in Washington](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8203898823&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Luke Messer **[honors top-performing 8th graders](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d4ce34f7a6&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Larry Buchson **[i](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=bcfeb8d231&e=1acd9bb3d6)[s working on hyropower issues in Congress](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1b27da9cd2&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Trey Hollingsworth**[is focusing on workforce issues for trick drivers](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ff14560206&e=1acd9bb3d6)

| | |

President Donald Trump had a big week!

While holding an historic meeting with North Korea leader Kim Jong Un in Singapore, President Trump secured an agreement that puts us on a path to denuclearization on the Korean Peninsula, making the the world a safer place for all.

[Read this story from South Bend](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1a124f5972&e=1acd9bb3d6), and learn how this big win could impact elections in November!

This weekend, your Indiana Republican Party's dominance was on full display in Evansville!

Following convention, one political columnist even called our party's strength, "the most impressive political juggernaut by one party in our two centuries as a state."

Read the full column [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=82699b18d6&e=1acd9bb3d6), and learn more about how Indiana's one and only Party of Purpose continues to put forward top talent here and in Washington!

| [Read More](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3ea81a84b7&e=1acd9bb3d6 "Read More")
---
| |
---
The Hoosier workforce continues to grow!

Indiana now leads the nation in the percentage of employers that say they're planning to add jobs in July, August, and September. In fact, with an unemployment rate of 3.2%, our jobless rate is the lowest of all surrounding states!

[Read more](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=33fe173bc8&e=1acd9bb3d6) about this latest survey, and learn about the strength of our Hoosier economy!

clean_body: Energetic is the only word that can describe the momentum we're experiencing now as Republicans. Coming out of our 2018 Indiana Republican State... | | | | | | Energy Energetic is the only word that can describe the momentum we're experiencing now as Republicans! Coming out of our 2018 Indiana Republican State Convention in Evansville, we're motivated and working as one, unified team toward victory throughout the state in November. A few quick observations on our momentum following convention: We now officially have our all-star, all-female statewide team of Secretary of State Connie Lawson , Treasurer Kelly Mitchell , and Auditor Tera Klutz in place. A new poll came out this month that shows think Democrat Joe Donnelly doesn't deserve re-election, and that it's time to replace him with someone new. Even fewer Hoosiers say they're planning to actually vote for Democrat Donnelly. And that's while conservative outsider Mike Braun continues to pick up support statewide following convention, including meeting with Hoosiers and of the general election campaign. As Republicans, it's critical that we keep this momentum alive. The ball is in our court, and we've got the full team playing offense. And, I have to tell you, that team is reaching record proportions this year. Our field program is staffed up (with 27 Hoosiers...and growing...out there talking to voters). With the financial support of Senator Todd Young , we've also got a full slate of 33 college interns in place throughout the state. Together, this next generation of Hoosier Republican leaders is hard at work. But our record-setting team doesn't stop there. And that's because of you. Hoosier Republicans in all corners of Indiana, from Lake County to Clark County, from Steuben County to our convention host of Vanderburgh County and everywhere in between, are living this energy day-in and day-out. You're working hard, and you are taking the energy from Evansville to your home communities across the state. You are are the energy of our Indiana Republican Party, and together, we'll translate that energy into votes and campaign wins for our full Republican team. -Kyle Hupfer Pictured: Last Friday, Chairman Kyle Hupfer stood on stage with our full Indiana Republican Party ticket to help kick-off this year's 2018 Indiana Republican State Convention in Evansville. | | | | Governor Holcomb's Week That Was | | | New Jobs & New Hope in Fort Wayne This Wednesday, Governor Eric Holcomb had a busy day in Fort Wayne! It was exciting to first watch as he to Indiana, a state that's a leader in both agriculture and logistics! Operated by Walmart, this 250,000-square-foot, state-of-the-art plant will be responsible for creating up to 300 new Hoosier jobs! Next, of Fort Wayne's new opioid treatment center, the Bowen Recovery Center. This new center is another step to make sure that Hoosiers are within an hour's drive (or less) of help and treatment. And then, of course, Governor Holcomb couldn't leave Fort Wayne without making an unannounced stop with Chairman Kyle Hupfer to thank hardworking precinct committeemen at a party meeting in Allen County! Indiana's forward momentum continues, with Governor Holcomb at the helm! | | | The Mike Braun Corner | | | Hoosiers Rally Around Braun! U.S. Senate candidate Mike Braun had a big showing last weekend at the 2018 Indiana Republican State Convention! Hoosier Republicans from all over rallied in full support of sending a conservative outsider to the Senate...giving President Trump another critical reinforcement in Washington. And it came during another bad week for Democrat Joe Donnelly. That's because Democrat Donnelly flip-flopped his position, like he frequently does, this time on North Korea. While President Donald Trump has been working hard to secure a denuclearization agreement with North Korea, last September Democrat Donnelly gave what the of President Trump's strategy on the Korean Peninsula. And then this week, he shifted his position, claiming that he now "supports President Trump and his administration’s stated goal." With your help, this November let's send in a U.S. Senator who has President Trump's back! Let's elect Mike Braun, and send Democrat Donnelly packing! | | | National Day of Action | | Join Hoosiers this Saturday to Take Action! Tomorrow, join Republicans across the country for the National Day of Action! Here in Indiana, we're organizing training sessions statewide to help volunteers build campaign leadership skills...and then we'll go out and talk to voters about our candidates and the issues that matter most to Hoosiers. Check out the , and RSVP for the location closest to you! We'll see you tomorrow! | | News You Can Use Governor Eric Holcomb Lt. subject: Sorry, but this is important
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | Apologies, team. But yes, even at this time on a Friday, I need you for a second. Our mid-month deadline is at midnight tonight and we're still $2,998 short of our $15,000 goal. And with all that's going on, "short" is not something we want to be. [_**I need you to give whatever amount you can before time runs out.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f33/622b7b5b/1b5356da/307b80ca/1420451394/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180615d?refcode=dwse180615d_m&recurring=true&amount=5") And remember, when you do that, you're not just helping me. You're helping turnout the vote in FL-23. When you [_**make a contribution**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f33/622b7b5b/1b5356da/307b80ca/1420451394/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180615d?refcode=dwse180615d_m&recurring=true&amount=5"), you're helping us build a grassroots network dedicated to holding the Trump administration accountable. When you [_**make a contribution**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f33/622b7b5b/1b5356da/307b80ca/1420451394/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180615d?refcode=dwse180615d_m&recurring=true&amount=5"), you're helping us fight to protect Medicare and Social Security. When you [_**make a contribution**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f33/622b7b5b/1b5356da/307b80ca/1420451394/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180615d?refcode=dwse180615d_m&recurring=true&amount=5"), you're helping our efforts to preserve affordable health care for all of our families. Every time you give, no matter how much you give, you make this network stronger. You show Republicans that they will not bully us into silence. And these days, when we even have a bully in the White House, that is more important than anything. [_**Give what you can, whatever amount makes sense. Every dollar matters.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f33/622b7b5b/1b5356da/307b80ca/1420451394/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180615d?refcode=dwse180615d_m&recurring=true&amount=5") Thank you. Debbie Sent from my iPad. Please excuse any typos
---

body:
That's what we would call a "dad joke." But guess what Derek, we have a BRAND NEW video all about dad jokes for you! -------------------------------------------------------------------
|
---
[ ](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f139e/3e0906/6a3fb93d/3e341113/2187850073/VEsH/ "https://www.timkaine.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=20180615_3_CARD_TEAM_Dad-Jokes-NS&source=20180615_3_CARD_TEAM_Dad-Jokes-NS")

| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek - a lot of people got to know Tim a little better in 2016. And a common theme started to emerge... [](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f139e/3e0906/6a3fb93d/3e341112/2187850073/VEsE/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/Americas-Dad?source=20180615_3_CARD_TEAM_Dad-Jokes-NS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=20180615_3_CARD_TEAM_Dad-Jokes-NS") [Click to watch our NEW video - a tribute to Tim Kaine and his dad jokes >>](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f139e/3e0906/6a3fb93d/3e341111/2187850073/VEsF/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/Americas-Dad?source=20180615_3_CARD_TEAM_Dad-Jokes-NS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+Click+to+watch+our+NEW+video++a+tribute+&utm_campaign=20180615_3_CARD_TEAM_Dad-Jokes-NS")

Well, now Tim is aware of his role and embraces it, and here on Team Kaine, we see him live up to it every day.

Whether it's reminding everyone to stay hydrated and wear sunscreen at parades or getting riled up when talking about how you need to _really listen_ to old music on vinyl - he always fits the mold pretty well. [](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f139e/3e0906/6a3fb93d/3e341110/2187850073/VEsC/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/Americas-Dad?source=20180615_3_CARD_TEAM_Dad-Jokes-NS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=20180615_3_CARD_TEAM_Dad-Jokes-NS") The fact is, Tim Kaine has always been telling dad jokes, to him they were just regular jokes he found especially funny.

So don't worry, if you see a funny comment about Tim Kaine being a "total dad," we can confirm for you: It's true. His wife, Anne, says 90% of the jokes about things Tim Kaine would say or do are 100% accurate. [](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f139e/3e0906/6a3fb93d/3e341117/2187850073/VEsD/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/Americas-Dad?source=20180615_3_CARD_TEAM_Dad-Jokes-NS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=20180615_3_CARD_TEAM_Dad-Jokes-NS") [You haven't signed the card yet! It's not too late - Father's Day is tomorrow, so if you sign it now you'll make it just in time! Plus, we have a new video up! Click through to watch it!](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f139e/3e0906/6a3fb93d/3e341116/2187850073/VEsA/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/Americas-Dad?source=20180615_3_CARD_TEAM_Dad-Jokes-NS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6+-+You+havenrsquot+signed+the+card+yet+Itrs&utm_campaign=20180615_3_CARD_TEAM_Dad-Jokes-NS")

**(And don 't worry, Tim Kaine won't give you a lecture about procrastinating...)** | [**SIGN TIM 'S CARD**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f139e/3e0906/6a3fb93d/3e341115/2187850073/VEsB/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/Americas-Dad?source=20180615_3_CARD_TEAM_Dad-Jokes-NS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=7+-+SIGN+TIMrsquoS+CARD&utm_campaign=20180615_3_CARD_TEAM_Dad-Jokes-NS")
---
[https://secure.timkaine.com/Americas-Dad](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f139e/3e0906/6a3fb93d/3e341114/2187850073/VEsO/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/Americas-Dad?source=20180615_3_CARD_TEAM_Dad-Jokes-NS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=8+-+httpssecuretimkainecomAmericasDad&utm_campaign=20180615_3_CARD_TEAM_Dad-Jokes-NS")

Thanks!

_Dad Joke HQ (Team Kaine)_
